name: Scenario A: Same task across phone/email/meeting → 1 canonical task, 3 evidence links
description: Three evidence events from different sources all describe the same task: 'File motion to compel in Johnson matter by 2026-03-15'. Fingerprints match exactly, producing one canonical task with three evidence links.

evidence_events.raw_text: We need to file the motion to compel in the Johnson matter by March 15.
Please file the motion to compel in Johnson v. Smith by 3/15/2026.
Action item: File motion to compel, Johnson matter, deadline March 15.

File motion to compel in Johnson matter
